tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Simple and easy to play on acoustic guitar. Have fun and play with variations of the chords once you're comfortable.

content:
This is my first tab(: let me know what you think!

This is on Capo 1 

[Intro] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
I know they say you can't go home again[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
I just had to come back one last time[/tab]
[tab][ch]A9[/ch]
Ma'am I know you don't know me from Adam[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                            [ch]B[/ch]
But these handprints on the front steps are mine[/tab]

[tab][ch]E[/ch] 
Up those stairs in that little back bedroom[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
Is where i did my homework and i learned to play guitar[/tab]
[tab][ch]A9[/ch]
Now i bet you didn't know under that live oak[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                 [ch]B[/ch]
My favorite dog is buried in the yard[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A9[/ch]                                            [ch]E[/ch]
I thought if i could touch this place or feel it[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F#m[/ch]                              [ch]G#m[/ch]
This brokenness inside me might start healing[/tab]
[tab][ch]A9[/ch] 
Out here it's like i'm someone else[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C#m[/ch]                             [ch]A9[/ch]
I thought that maybe i could find myself[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]                               [ch]A9[/ch]
If I could just come in I swear I'll leave[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]B[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
Won't take nothing but a memory of the house that built me[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
Mama cut out pictures of houses for years[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
From "Better Homes and Garden" magazine[/tab]
[tab][ch]A9[/ch] 
Plans were drawn concrete poured nail by nail and board by board[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                          [ch]B[/ch]
Daddy gave life to mama's dream[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A9[/ch]                                            [ch]E[/ch]
I thought if i could touch this place or feel it[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F#m[/ch]                              [ch]G#m[/ch]
This brokenness inside me might start healing[/tab]
[tab][ch]A9[/ch] 
Out here it's like i'm someone else[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C#m[/ch]                             [ch]A9[/ch]
I thought that maybe i could find myself[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]                               [ch]A9[/ch]
If I could just come in I swear I'll leave[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]B[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
Won't take nothing but a memory of the house that built me[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                                          [ch]E[/ch]
You leave home and you move on and you do the best you can[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                                    [ch]A9[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]
I got lost in this whole world and forgot who i am[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A9[/ch]                                            [ch]E[/ch]
I thought if i could touch this place or feel it[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F#m[/ch]                              [ch]G#m[/ch]
This brokenness inside me might start healing[/tab]
[tab][ch]A9[/ch] 
Out here it's like i'm someone else[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C#m[/ch]                             [ch]A9[/ch]
I thought that maybe i could find myself[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]                               [ch]A9[/ch]
If I could just come in I swear I'll leave[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]B[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
Won't take nothing but a memory of the house that built me[/tab]

[Outro] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]A9[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
